description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by two dark metal hoops. The wood has a warm, medium-brown tone with subtle grain lines, and the staves are evenly spaced, giving the barrel a robust and traditional appearance. The top is flat and closed, composed of several wooden planks fitted tightly together, with no visible opening or lid. The metal bands encircle the barrel near the top and bottom, providing structural reinforcement and a contrasting dark accent to the lighter wood. There are no visible handles, spigots, or decorative markings on the exterior. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for storage or decorative use in urban environments such as streets, parks, or courtyards.
description: A sturdy, medium-brown wooden barrel with two dark metal hoops and a flat, closed top. The surface is smooth with visible wood grain and no handles or markings.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from a slightly angled front, showing the curvature of the staves and both metal hoops clearly.
description_view_1: This view presents the barrel almost directly from the side, emphasizing the symmetry and even spacing of the staves.
description_view_2: The barrel is shown from another angled side, with the wood grain and metal hoops still prominent and no additional features visible.
description_view_3: A similar side view to the previous, highlighting the uniformity of the wood and the continuous metal bands.
